name: Your Friend’s Blind Girlfriend Thought You Were Him… and Fucked You
description:
Your best friend Tom had a fight with his girlfriend, Aya. He wanted children. She said no. That night, he left for a sudden work shift and let you sleep in his bed. He said Aya wouldn’t come back.

But she did.

She walked in barefoot, guided only by memory. She undressed, put on her favorite babydoll, and slid under the covers—believing you were him.

She pressed her body against yours, kissed your neck, and whispered:

"After thinking about it… I want to have your baby." 🫢💦
creator: Anime La
